channel.title: Cakessquares on Bell Favorite Recipes
channel.description: Recent content in Cakessquares on Bell Favorite Recipes

item.title: Yogurt Blueberry Muffins
item.description:
Submitted by Ruth Divver

Aunt of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 cup plain yogurt
  • 2 tsp baking powder
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • ½ cup oil
  • 1 egg
  • 1 cup bran
  • 2 cups flour
  • ½ tsp vanilla
  • 1 cup blueberries

Instructions

In a small bowl, mix yogurt andoneteaspoon of baking powder. Set aside.

In a large bowl, mix all other ingredients, including the second teaspoon of baking powder. Mix the yogurt mixture into the large bowl.

item.title: Toffee-Topped Bars
item.description:
Submitted by Monique Racine-Theriault

Cousin of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 2 cups firmly packed brown sugar
  • 2 cups flour
  • ½ cup butter, softened
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • ½ tsp salt
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • 1 cup milk
  • 1 egg
  • 1 cup semi-sweet chocolate chips
  • ½ cup walnuts
  • ¼ cup flaked unsweetened coconut

Instructions

Mix the brown sugar and flour together. Using a pastry cutter or two knives, cut in the butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Remove one cup of mixture and set aside.

item.title: Texas Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Sherry and Paul Beaulieu

Cousins of the Bride

  • 1/2 cup margarine
  • 2 cups flour
  • 2 tsp baking soda
  • 1/2 tsp salt
  • 1 1/2 cups white sugar
  • 2 eggs
  • 1-19 oz can of crushed pineapple

Combine all ingredients and place in a 9x13 inch glass pan. Cook at 325 degrees for 45-55 minutes. Insert a toothpick in the centre of the cake to check if it’s ready.

Sauce:

Ingredients

  • 1/2 cup margarine
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • 2/3 cup Carnation milk
  • 1 cup coconut
  • 1 tsp vanilla

Instructions

Combine margarine, brown sugar and milk in a saucepan and bring to a boil. Continue boiling sauce for 5 minutes and then add coconut and vanilla.

item.title: Sucre a creme
item.description:
Submitted by Yvette and Gilles Guenette

Friends of the Bride’s Family

Ingredients

  • 3 tasses de sucre brun
  • 2 tasses de sucre blanc
  • 5 tasses de crème
  • 4 cuillers à soupe de cornstarch
  • ¼ à ½ tasse de noix hachés

Instructions

Faire chauffer le sucre et la crème jusqu’à ébullition. Retirer du feu et ajouter le cornstarch. Diluer tout en brassant et ajouter les noix. Laisser refroidir avant de déposer dans vos tartes. Ces tartes ont un dessous et un dessus de pâte.

item.title: SINamon Buns
item.description:
Submitted by Louise Dubyk and Don Broughtor

Cousin of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 2 cups flour
  • 2/3 cup butter or margarine
  • 2 tbsp sugar
  • 2 cups brown sugar
  • 4 tsp baking powder
  • 6-8 tsp cinnamon
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 1/2 cup raisins
  • 1/4 cup cold butter
  • 1 cup cold milk

Instructions

Put flour, sugar, baking powder and salt in a large bowl. Cut in 1/4 cup of butter or margarine. Make a well in the centre. Pour milk into well. Stir to form soft dough (add a bit more milk if necessary).

item.title: Stock Club Cake with Coffee Icing
item.description:
Submitted by Dean Pigeau and Karen Cosgrove

Cousin of the Bride

Cake:

  • 1 1/2 cup flour
  • 1 cup sugar
  • 1 1/2 tsp soda
  • 1/4 cup cocoa
  • 1 cup mayonnaise
  • 7/8 cup water

Bake for 1 hour or less at 350 degrees.

Coffee Icing:

Ingredients

  • 1/2 tsp coffee
  • 1 tbsp margarine
  • 2 tsp boiling water
  • 1 tsp cocoa
  • 1 cup icing sugar

Instructions

Mix coffee, margarine, water and cocoa until smooth. Slowly add icing sugar until creamy.

item.title: Sour Cream Coffee Cake with Strueusel
item.description:
Submitted by Christine and Graham Baker

Cousins of the Bride

A rich sour cream coffee cake which may be layered or simply topped with tart cranberries and spicy sweet streusel. Wonderful served warm with ice cream or whipped cream.

Streusel:

  • ¾ cup lightly packed brown sugar
  • 1 tsp cinnamon
  • ½ cup all purpose flour
  • ¼ cup butter

Mix together sugar, flour, and cinnamon. Blend in butter until crumbly.

Cake:

Ingredients

  • ½ cup soft butter
  • 2 eggs
  • 2 cups all purpose flour
  • 1 tsp baking soda
  • 1 cup dairy sour cream
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • ½ tsp salt
  • 2 cups cranberries, fresh or frozen

Instructions

Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time, then vanilla. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda and salt. Add to creamed mixture. Add sour cream.

item.title: Skor Bars
item.description:
Submitted by Lisa and Derry Thibeault

Cousins of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1 box of Ritz crackers, finely crushed
  • 4 Skor chocolate bars, finely crushed
  • 1 can of Eaglebrand
  • 1 tub of chocolate icing

Instructions

Put ½ cup of Skor pieces aside for topping.

Combine Ritz crackers and Eaglebrand, mix well. Mix in remaining Skor pieces.

Pour into a greased 8x8 inch pan. Bake at 300 degrees for 20 minutes. Let cool for 20 minutes. Frost with chocolate icing and sprinkle remaining Skor pieces on top.

item.title: Rhubarb Muffins
item.description:
Submitted by Marie and Will Sayer

Cousins of the Bride

  • 3 cups rhubarb, diced
  • 1 1/3 cups whole wheat flour
  • 1 1/3 cups all purpose flour
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • 1 tsp baking soda
  • 1/4 tsp salt
  • 1 cup yogurt or sour cream
  • 1/2 cup vegetable oil
  • 2 eggs
  • 1 cup chopped nuts

Topping:

Ingredients

  • 1/2 cup brown sugar
  • 1/2 cup chopped nuts
  • 2 tbsp butter
  • 1 tsp cinnamon

Instructions

In a large bowl, combine rhubarb, flours, brown sugar, baking soda and salt.

item.title: Picnic Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Shirley and Rob Webster

Aunt and Uncle of the Groom

Cake:

  • ½ cup margarine
  • 2 cups all purpose flour
  • 1 ¼ cup white sugar
  • 1 tbsp baking powder
  • ¼ cup peanut butter
  • ½ tsp salt
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • 1 cup milk
  • 2 eggs

Cream margarine and sugar. Add peanut butter, vanilla and eggs. Beat well. In a separate bowl, blend together flour, baking powder and salt. Add to creamed mixture, alternating with milk. Mix well after each addition.

item.title: Pep's Favorite Brownies
item.description:
Submitted by Colette and Mike Peplinskie

Sister and Brother-in-law of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 ½ cup all purpose flour
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 2 cups white sugar
  • ½ cup cocoa
  • 2 tsp vanilla
  • 1 cup oil
  • 4 eggs
  • ¼ cup cold water
  • ½ cup (or more) chopped walnuts

Instructions

Place all ingredients in a beater bowl in the order given, ending with walnuts. Beat on low speed or by hand until smooth. Do not beat for too long.

item.title: Peppermint Squares
item.description:
Submitted by Chantal and Angus Muir

Cousins of the Groom

  • ½ cup margarine or butter
  • ¼ cup white sugar
  • 3 tsp cocoa
  • 1 egg
  • pinch of salt
  • ½ tsp vanilla

Melt above ingredients together until smooth. Add 2 cups of graham wafer crumbs and 1 cup of coconut. Press firmly into a 9x9 inch pan.

Ingredients

  • ¼ cup margarine or butter
  • 2 cups icing sugar
  • 2 tbsp hot milk
  • ½ tsp peppermint extract

Instructions

Mix above ingredients and spread over first layer in pan. Pour a mixture of 3 melted squares of semi-sweet chocolate and 1 tablespoon of margarine or butter over top. Put in the fridge. Cut into squares before it gets too hard. Store in fridge.

item.title: OREO Cookie Dessert
item.description:
Submitted by Fern Henri

Uncle of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1 square box of vanilla ice cream
  • 1 container of Cool Whip

Instructions

Cut ice cream up into ½ to 1 inch thick pieces to fill the bottom of a 9 inch square pan or a 9x13 inch pan.

Crush OREO cookies until crumbly. Spread on top of ice cream. Pour chocolate syrup over cookies.

Spread Cool Whip over top. Sprinkle more crushed cookies over Cool Whip to decorate.

item.title: Mix-In-The-Pan Carrot Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Jeannine and Elmer Bell

Parents of the Groom

  • 1 cup flour
  • 1 tsp cinnamon
  • 1 ½ cup shredded carrots
  • ½ cup oil
  • ½ tsp vanilla
  • ¾ cup sugar
  • ¼ tsp nutmeg
  • 2 eggs, slightly beaten
  • ¼ cup water
  • icing sugar, optional
  • ½ tsp each of salt, baking soda and baking powder

With fork, in an 8 or 9 inch square pan, mix flour, sugar, cinnamon, salt, baking soda, baking powder and nutmeg. Add carrots, eggs, oil, water and vanilla.

item.title: Malva Pudding Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Claire and Marc Massicotte

Aunt and Uncle of the Groom

Cake:

  • 1 cup sugar
  • 1 egg
  • 1 tbsp apricot jam
  • 1 cup flour
  • l tsp baking soda
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • generous pinch of salt
  • 1 tbsp butter
  • 1 tsp white vinegar
  • 1 cup milk

Beat the egg and sugar well with a mixer. In a separate bowl, combine the jam, sifted flour, soda, baking powder and salt. In another bowl, melt butter and add the vinegar. Add liquids to egg mixture alternately with the flour.

item.title: Ice Box Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Lorna and Zoran Popovitch

Aunt and Uncle of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 30 marshmallows, chopped fine
  • 30 graham wafers, rolled fine
  • 18 cherries, chopped
  • ½ cup walnuts, chopped
  • 1 can Eaglebrand Milk
  • 1 cup coconut

Instructions

Mix the first four ingredients with the can of Eaglebrand. Butter a shallow pan and spread thick with half the coconut.

Spread the Eaglebrand mixture over the coconut, then spread another layer of coconut on top. Pack well and put in the fridge for 24 hours.

item.title: Granny Sayer's Rum Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Pat and Tom Sayer

Aunt and Uncle of the Bride

  • 1 yellow Duncan Hines cake mix
  • 1 small instant Jello vanilla pudding
  • 4 eggs
  • ½ cup Crisco oil
  • ½ cup water
  • ¼ cup White Rum

Mix above ingredients together and bake in a greased bundt pan to which ¼ cup of chopped pecans has been added. Bake at 350 degrees for 55 minutes.

Topping:

In a sauce pan, combine the following:

item.title: Graham Coconut Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Margaret and Walter Smith

Friends of the Bride’s Family

Ingredients

  • ½ cup butter, room temperature
  • 1 cup white sugar
  • 2 cups graham crumbs
  • 1 egg
  • 1 cup medium coconut
  • 1 cup milk
  • 3 tbsp flour
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • ½ tsp vanilla
  • pinch of salt

Instructions

Cream butter and sugar together. Add beaten egg. Add other ingredients and mix well.

Place in a 9x9 inch pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes. Serve with ice cream or whipped cream.

item.title: Drumstick Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Kevin Roy

Cousin of the Bride

Base:

  • 1 ½ cups vanilla or graham crumbs
  • ½ cup chopped peanuts or walnuts
  • ¼ cup melted butter
  • 2 tbsp peanut butter

Mix the above ingredients and place in a 9x13 inch pan. Save some of the mixture for the topping.

Filling:

Ingredients

  • 250 gr cream cheese
  • ½ cup white sugar
  • ½ cup peanut butter
  • 2 tsp vanilla
  • 4 eggs, add one at a time
  • 1 large container Cool Whip

Instructions

Mix the above ingredients and layer on top of the base.

item.title: Chocolate Eclair Squares
item.description:
Submitted by Amanda McCabe and Jason Simard

Friends of the Bride and Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 container of chocolate icing
  • 1 box of graham crackers
  • 1 pkg of instant vanilla pudding
  • ½ cup of sugar
  • 500 mL whipping cream

Instructions

Prepare vanilla pudding according to the directions on the package. Set aside.

Whip up whipping cream, slowly adding sugar until peaks form. Fold whipping cream into vanilla pudding.

Line an 8x10 inch baking dish with graham crackers. Pour in half of the pudding mixture. Cover pudding mixture with another layer of graham crackers. Pour second half of pudding mixture over graham crackers. Line mixture with graham crackers.

item.title: Chocolate Butterscotch Almond Crunch
item.description:
Submitted by Diane Laderoute

Cousin of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1 ¾ cup flour
  • ¾ cup white sugar
  • ¾ cup brown sugar
  • 1 cup margarine or butter
  • 2 egg yolks
  • ½ tsp vanilla
  • 1 pkg milk chocolate chips
  • 1 cup slivered almonds

Instructions

Combine flour and sugars. Mix margarine in until blended. Add egg yolk and vanilla. Mix until smooth.

Press with floured fingers onto a 10x15 inch cookie sheet with sides. Bake at 350 degrees for 13-18 minutes or until light golden.

item.title: Chipits Chewy Nut Bars
item.description:
Submitted by Diane and Harold Bell

Aunt and Uncle of the Groom

Ingredients

  • ½ cup margarine
  • 2 cups packed brown sugar
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • 2 eggs
  • 1 ½ cup all purpose flour
  • 2 tsp baking powder
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 1 cup semi-sweet Chipits
  • 1 cup coarsely chopped nuts

Instructions

Melt margarine in a large pot. Remove from heat. Add sugar and vanilla stirring until well blended. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir together flour, baking powder and salt. Add to the pot and mix well.

item.title: Cherry Chews
item.description:
Submitted by Anne Mary and Jean-Paul Racine

Aunt and Uncle of the Bride

Bottom:

  • l cup sifted flour
  • 1 cup rolled oats
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • ½ cup butter

Mix flour, oats, brown sugar, soda and salt. Add butter and mix until crumbly, first with a fork, then with fingers. Place mixture into bottom of a greased 9x13 inch pan. Bake for 10 minutes.

Filling:

  • 2 eggs
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • ½ tsp almond extract
  • 2 tbsp flour
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • ½ tsp salt
  • 1 cup coconut
  • ½ cup pecan halves
  • 1 cup well drained maraschino cherries, halved

Beat eggs. Stir in brown sugar, almond flavoring, flour, baking powder, salt, coconut, and maraschino cherries and stir to blend. Pour over first mixture and spread evenly. Sprinkle with pecans. Return to oven and bake 25 minutes until lightly browned. Ice with Cherry Almond icing. Cut into squares or bars to serve. Makes 2 dozen 1½x2 inch bars.

item.title: Cherry Cheesecake
item.description:
Submitted by Stella and Ben Daigle

Friends of the Bride’s Family

Ingredients

  • 2 cups graham crumbs
  • ½ cup melted butter
  • 2 tbsp brown sugar
  • 1-8 oz pkg of Philadelphia cream cheese
  • 1 large pkg of Dream Whip
  • 1 cup white sugar
  • 1 can cherry pie filling

Instructions

Mix graham crumbs, melted butter and brown sugar together. Press into an 8x12 inch pan.

Mix Dream Whip according to directions on package. Add cream cheese and white sugar to whipped Dream Whip. Spread over graham crumbs. Top with cherry pie filling.

item.title: Caramelized Pear & Apple Bread Pudding
item.description:
Submitted by Judy and Roger Lafreniere

Aunt and Uncle of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 2 tbsp butter
  • 2 pears, peeled, cored and cut into ¼ inch wedges
  • 2 apples, peeled, cored and cut into ¼ inch wedges
  • ¼ cup brown sugar
  • 5 cups french bread, cut into ½ inch cubes
  • ½ cup raisins
  • ½ cup pecans, coarsely chopped
  • 2 ¼ cups real whipping cream
  • 3 eggs
  • 2 tsp vanilla
  • 1 tsp nutmeg
  • 1 tsp cinnamon

Instructions

In a large frying pan, melt butter over medium heat. Add fruit and cook , stirring occasionally until tender. Stir in brown sugar, increase heat and cook for 3 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in the bread, raisins and pecans. Set aside.

item.title: Caramel Pecan Cheesecake
item.description:
Submitted by Sandra Stewart

Friend of the Bride and Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 ready-to-use Graham pie crust
  • 20 caramel squares
  • 3 tbsp milk
  • ½ cup chopped pecans
  • 2 pkgs cream cheese, softened
  • ½ cup sugar
  • 2 eggs

Instructions

Microwave caramels and milk until melted (about 2 min; stir after 1 min). Stir in pecans and mix well. Pour into pie crust and chill for 10 minutes.

Beat (medium speed) softened cream cheese, sugar and eggs until smooth. Pour into chilled pie crust.

item.title: Blueberry Cheesecake
item.description:
Submitted by Joanne and Greg Craig

Cousins of the Bride

Crust:

  • ½ cup butter
  • 2 cups graham crumbs
  • ¼ cup sugar

Topping:

  • 2 pkgs Dream Whip
  • 1 pkg cream cheese
  • ½ cup sugar

Filling:

Ingredients

  • ¾ cup sugar
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 3 tbsp cornstarch
  • 1 tbsp butter
  • ¼ cup water
  • 1 tbsp lemon juice
  • 4 cups fresh/frozen blueberries

Note: Above filling can be substituted for 2 cans of blueberry pie filling.

item.title: Birthday Cake with German Icing
item.description:
Submitted by Louise and Dan Pigeau

Aunt and Uncle of the Bride

Cake:

  • 2 cups flour
  • 1 1/4 cup sugar
  • dash of salt
  • 3 tsp baking powder
  • 2 eggs
  • 3/4 cup oil
  • 1 tsp vanilla

Mix first four ingredients together, then add remaining ingredients. Bake at 350 degrees for 30-45 minutes

German Icing:

Ingredients

  • 1 egg, beaten
  • 2/3 cup brown sugar
  • 1/2 cup can milk
  • 2 tbsp butter
  • 1/4 tsp salt

Instructions

Boil until it starts to thicken and add 1 ½ cup of coconut and ½ cup of nuts.

item.title: Banana Cake with Caramel Icing
item.description:
Submitted by Shirley and Dave Jodouin

Cousins of the Groom

Cake:

  • 2 ½ cups flour
  • 1 ½ tsp baking soda
  • 1 ½ tsp baking powder
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 1 ½ cup white sugar
  • ¼ tsp cinnamon
  • 2 eggs
  • 1 cup mashed bananas
  • 1 cup buttermilkor1 cup sourmilk (add 2 tbsp vinegar to your regular cup of milk)

Throw all the ingredients into a big bowl and mix. Pour into a 3 L pan that has been greased, and bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until a knife inserted in the middle comes out clean and dry.

item.title: Apple Crisp
item.description:
Submitted by Heather Bell

Bride

Ingredients

  • 32 Ritz crackers, crushed
  • 1 ½ cups brown sugar
  • ¼ cup flour
  • ¼ tsp cinnamon
  • ½ cup butter
  • 4 cups chopped apples

Instructions

Mix all ingredients together except for the apples. Place half of the apples on the bottom of a baking dish. Add half of Ritz mixture on top of apples. Place remaining apples and then remaining Ritz mixture on top.

Bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes.
